title: Putzeysia gemmipara

The classification of Putzeysia gemmipara is within the genus Putzeysia, a group of plants that are known to form symbiotic relationships with their host species. Putzeysia gemmipara is closely related to other species within the Santalaceae family, which includes mistletoes and sandalwoods. Further classification of the species can be determined through molecular analysis and comparative morphology.
